# Molecule Dynamics Simulations

**Summary**: A computer simulation method for understanding the physical movements of atoms and molecules.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2024-habiburrahman|HABIBURRAHMAN, 2024]] referenced molecular dynamics simulations to explain the role of SDS in stabilizing bubbles.

## Key Results and Findings

- MD simulations indicated that SDS reduces CO2-water interfacial tension by forming a compact surfactant monolayer. ([[2024-habiburrahman|HABIBURRAHMAN, 2024, p. 142]])
